subject: request closed: access request for karolina.asklund@enron.com

emails.subject: Request Closed: Access Request for karolina.asklund@enron.com
emails.subject_base: Request Closed: Access Request for karolina.asklund@enron.com
emails.body: You should now have edit access for the financial trading database. Please only edit those entries relating relating to ECTRIC. Below is the icon which I hope should get you entry into the database (it's a shortcut, and I'm not sure it work in England, let me know and I'll stop sending it to people there if it doesn't!). Link ----- Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 05/10/2001 04:23 PM ARSystem <ARSystem@mailman.enron.com> 05/10/2001 04:11 PM

emails.body: Re: Request Closed: Access Request for karolina.asklund@enron.com Many thanks Tara the icon works, Please note however that my surname has changed to Moran since end of last year, Kind Regards, Karolina From: Tana Jones on 10/05/2001 16:26 CDT
